Authors and Citation

Authors

  • Jiakun Lin. Author, maintainer.

  • Victoria Landsman. Author.

  • Aya A. Mitani. Author.

Citation

Source: inst/CITATION

Landsman, V., Wang, L., Carrillo-Garcia, I., Mitani, A. A., Smith, P. M., Graubard, B. I., Bui, T., and Carnide, N. (2026). Correction for participation bias in nonprobability samples using multiple reference surveys. Statistics in Medicine, 45(3-5). doi:10.1002/sim.70403

@Article{,
  title = {Correction for Participation Bias in Nonprobability Samples Using Multiple Reference Surveys},
  author = {Victoria Landsman and L. Wang and I. Carrillo-Garcia and Aya A. Mitani and P. M. Smith and B. I. Graubard and T. Bui and N. Carnide},
  journal = {Statistics in Medicine},
  year = {2026},
  volume = {45},
  number = {3-5},
  doi = {10.1002/sim.70403},
}

Lin, J., Landsman, V., and Mitani, A. A. (2026). nonprobsampling: Inference for Nonprobability Samples Using Multiple Reference Surveys. R package version 0.1.0. https://github.com/Jiakun0611/nonprobsampling

@Manual{,
  title = {nonprobsampling: Inference for Nonprobability Samples Using Multiple Reference Surveys},
  author = {Jiakun Lin and Victoria Landsman and Aya A. Mitani},
  year = {2026},
  note = {R package version 0.1.0},
  url = {https://github.com/Jiakun0611/nonprobsampling},
}
